Red seaweeds (Rhodophyta) on Singapore shores: photo index

seaweeds text index | photo index Seaweeds

Division Rhodophyta Photo index of red seaweeds on Singapore shores
Soft hairy, feathery, filaments


Tiny fern
red seaweed Bostrychia sp.


Cat’s tail
red seaweed Asapargopsis taxiformis

*

*
Cotton candy
red seaweed awaiting identification

Feathery
red seaweed Spyridia filamentosa

  Mats of tiny feathery, fern-like blades (0.5-1cm). Brown, yellow, reddish. Natural rocky shores at the high water mark. 6-8cm. Feathery branches of fine filaments. On coral rubble. Sometimes seen on our Southern shores. Fluffy ball of fine filaments to 3-5cm across. On coral rubble. Sometimes seen on our Southern shores. 2-4cm. Feathery branches of fine filaments. On hard things in sandy areas. Sometimes seen on our Southern shores.

seaweeds on this site

sheets, ribbons, filaments

serrated strips

fleshy stems, beads

soft hairy, feathery

hard branching, encrusting
